WHAT: accountAdmin cross-org data exposure via REST export endpoints; graphql path has the fix, REST doesn't
EVIDENCE: exportHandlers.ts:71
IMPACT: account admin scoped to org A could fetch a PPTX containing org B data
OPTIONS:
1. add ensureAccountAdminCanAccessBrDeckOrg in REST handlers
